  ### IFragmentConcatenator <a name="IFragmentConcatenator" id="cdktn.IFragmentConcatenator"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.StringConcat">StringConcat</a>, <a href="#cdktn.IFragmentConcatenator">IFragmentConcatenator</a>
  
  Function used to concatenate symbols in the target document language.
  
  Interface so it could potentially be exposed over jsii.

  | **Name** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IFragmentConcatenator.join">Join</a></code> | Join the fragment on the left and on the right. |
  
  ---

  ```go
  func Join(left interface{}, right interface{}) interface{}
  ```
  
  Join the fragment on the left and on the right.

  - *Type:* interface{}

  ###### `right`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="right" id="cdktn.IFragmentConcatenator.join.parameter.right"></a>
  
  - *Type:* interface{}

  ### IPostProcessor <a name="IPostProcessor" id="cdktn.IPostProcessor"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.IPostProcessor">IPostProcessor</a>
  
  A Token that can post-process the complete resolved value, after resolve() has recursed over it.
  
  #### Methods <a name="Methods" id="Methods"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IPostProcessor.postProcess">PostProcess</a></code> | Process the completely resolved value, after full recursion/resolution has happened. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `PostProcess` <a name="PostProcess" id="cdktn.IPostProcessor.postProcess"></a>
  
  ```go
  func PostProcess(input interface{}, context IResolveContext) interface{}
  ```
  
  Process the completely resolved value, after full recursion/resolution has happened.
  
  ###### `input`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="input" id="cdktn.IPostProcessor.postProcess.parameter.input"></a>
  
  - *Type:* interface{}
  
  ---
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.IPostProcessor.postProcess.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---

  ### IResolvable <a name="IResolvable" id="cdktn.IResolvable"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.AnyListList">AnyListList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.AnyListMap">AnyListMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.AnyMap">AnyMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.AnyMapList">AnyMapList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.BooleanList">BooleanList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.BooleanListList">BooleanListList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.BooleanListMap">BooleanListMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.BooleanMap">BooleanMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.BooleanMapList">BooleanMapList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.ComplexComputedList">ComplexComputedList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.ComplexList">ComplexList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.ComplexMap">ComplexMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.ComplexObject">ComplexObject</a>, <a href="#cdktn.LazyBase">LazyBase</a>, <a href="#cdktn.MapList">MapList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.NumberListList">NumberListList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.NumberListMap">NumberListMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.NumberMap">NumberMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.NumberMapList">NumberMapList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.StringListList">StringListList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.StringListMap">StringListMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.StringMap">StringMap</a>, <a href="#cdktn.StringMapList">StringMapList</a>, <a href="#cdktn.IResolvable">IResolvable</a>
  
  Interface for values that can be resolvable later.
  
  Tokens are special objects that participate in synthesis.
  
  #### Methods <a name="Methods" id="Methods"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolvable.resolve">Resolve</a></code> | Produce the Token's value at resolution time. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolvable.toString">ToString</a></code> | Return a string representation of this resolvable object. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `Resolve` <a name="Resolve" id="cdktn.IResolvable.resolve"></a>
  
  ```go
  func Resolve(context IResolveContext) interface{}
  ```
  
  Produce the Token's value at resolution time.
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.IResolvable.resolve.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `ToString` <a name="ToString" id="cdktn.IResolvable.toString"></a>
  
  ```go
  func ToString() *string
  ```
  
  Return a string representation of this resolvable object.
  
  Returns a reversible string representation.
  
  #### Properties <a name="Properties" id="Properties"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Type** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolvable.property.creationStack">CreationStack</a></code> | <code>*[]*string</code> | The creation stack of this resolvable which will be appended to errors thrown during resolution. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `CreationStack`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="CreationStack" id="cdktn.IResolvable.property.creationStack"></a>
  
  ```go
  func CreationStack() *[]*string
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *[]*string
  
  The creation stack of this resolvable which will be appended to errors thrown during resolution.
  
  If this returns an empty array the stack will not be attached.
  
  ---
  
  ### IResolveContext <a name="IResolveContext" id="cdktn.IResolveContext"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  Current resolution context for tokens.
  
  #### Methods <a name="Methods" id="Methods"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.registerPostProcessor">RegisterPostProcessor</a></code> | Use this postprocessor after the entire token structure has been resolved. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.resolve">Resolve</a></code> | Resolve an inner object. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `RegisterPostProcessor` <a name="RegisterPostProcessor" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.registerPostProcessor"></a>
  
  ```go
  func RegisterPostProcessor(postProcessor IPostProcessor)
  ```
  
  Use this postprocessor after the entire token structure has been resolved.
  
  ###### `postProcessor`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="postProcessor" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.registerPostProcessor.parameter.postProcessor"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IPostProcessor">IPostProcessor</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `Resolve` <a name="Resolve" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.resolve"></a>
  
  ```go
  func Resolve(x interface{}) interface{}
  ```
  
  Resolve an inner object.
  
  ###### `x`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="x" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.resolve.parameter.x"></a>
  
  - *Type:* interface{}
  
  ---
  
  #### Properties <a name="Properties" id="Properties"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Type** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.property.preparing">Preparing</a></code> | <code>*bool</code> | True when we are still preparing, false if we're rendering the final output. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.property.scope">Scope</a></code> | <code>github.com/aws/constructs-go/constructs/v10.IConstruct</code> | The scope from which resolution has been initiated. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.property.ignoreEscapes">IgnoreEscapes</a></code> | <code>*bool</code> | True when ${} should not be parsed, and treated as literals. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.property.iteratorContext">IteratorContext</a></code> | <code>*string</code> | TerraformIterators can be passed for block attributes and normal list attributes both require different handling when the iterable variable is accessed e.g. a dynamic block needs each.key while a for expression just needs key. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.property.suppressBraces">SuppressBraces</a></code> | <code>*bool</code> | True when ${} should be ommitted (because already inside them), false otherwise. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext.property.warnEscapes">WarnEscapes</a></code> | <code>*bool</code> | True when ${} should not be included in the string to be resolved, outputs a warning. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `Preparing`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="Preparing" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.property.preparing"></a>
  
  ```go
  func Preparing() *bool
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *bool
  
  True when we are still preparing, false if we're rendering the final output.
  
  ---
  
  ##### `Scope`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="Scope" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.property.scope"></a>
  
  ```go
  func Scope() IConstruct
  ```
  
  - *Type:* github.com/aws/constructs-go/constructs/v10.IConstruct
  
  The scope from which resolution has been initiated.
  
  ---
  
  ##### `IgnoreEscapes`<sup>Optional</sup> <a name="IgnoreEscapes" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.property.ignoreEscapes"></a>
  
  ```go
  func IgnoreEscapes() *bool
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *bool
  
  True when ${} should not be parsed, and treated as literals.
  
  ---
  
  ##### `IteratorContext`<sup>Optional</sup> <a name="IteratorContext" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.property.iteratorContext"></a>
  
  ```go
  func IteratorContext() *string
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *string
  
  TerraformIterators can be passed for block attributes and normal list attributes both require different handling when the iterable variable is accessed e.g. a dynamic block needs each.key while a for expression just needs key.
  
  ---
  
  ##### `SuppressBraces`<sup>Optional</sup> <a name="SuppressBraces" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.property.suppressBraces"></a>
  
  ```go
  func SuppressBraces() *bool
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *bool
  
  True when ${} should be ommitted (because already inside them), false otherwise.
  
  ---
  
  ##### `WarnEscapes`<sup>Optional</sup> <a name="WarnEscapes" id="cdktn.IResolveContext.property.warnEscapes"></a>
  
  ```go
  func WarnEscapes() *bool
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *bool
  
  True when ${} should not be included in the string to be resolved, outputs a warning.
  
  Default: false
  
  ---

  ### ISynthesisSession <a name="ISynthesisSession" id="cdktn.ISynthesisSession"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.ISynthesisSession">ISynthesisSession</a>
  
  Represents a single session of synthesis.
  
  Passed into `TerraformStack.onSynthesize()` methods.
  originally from aws/constructs lib v3.3.126 (synth functionality was removed in constructs v10)
  
  
  #### Properties <a name="Properties" id="Properties"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Type** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ISynthesisSession.property.manifest">Manifest</a></code> | <code><a href="#cdktn.Manifest">Manifest</a></code> | *No description.* |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ISynthesisSession.property.outdir">Outdir</a></code> | <code>*string</code> | The output directory for this synthesis session. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ISynthesisSession.property.skipValidation">SkipValidation</a></code> | <code>*bool</code> | *No description.* |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `Manifest`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="Manifest" id="cdktn.ISynthesisSession.property.manifest"></a>
  
  ```go
  func Manifest() Manifest
  ```
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.Manifest">Manifest</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `Outdir`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="Outdir" id="cdktn.ISynthesisSession.property.outdir"></a>
  
  ```go
  func Outdir() *string
  ```
  
  - *Type:* *string
  
  The output directory for this synthesis session.
  
  ---
  
  ##### `SkipValidation`<sup>Optional</sup> <a name="SkipValidation" id="cdktn.ISynthesisSession.property.skipValidation"></a>

  ### ITokenMapper <a name="ITokenMapper" id="cdktn.ITokenMapper"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.ITokenMapper">ITokenMapper</a>
  
  Interface to apply operation to tokens in a string.
  
  Interface so it can be exported via jsii.
  
  #### Methods <a name="Methods" id="Methods"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ITokenMapper.mapToken">MapToken</a></code> | Replace a single token. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `MapToken` <a name="MapToken" id="cdktn.ITokenMapper.mapToken"></a>
  
  ```go
  func MapToken(t IResolvable) interface{}
  ```
  
  Replace a single token.
  
  ###### `t`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="t" id="cdktn.ITokenMapper.mapToken.parameter.t"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolvable">IResolvable</a>
  
  ---
  
  
  ### ITokenResolver <a name="ITokenResolver" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver"></a>
  
  - *Implemented By:* <a href="#cdktn.DefaultTokenResolver">DefaultTokenResolver</a>, <a href="#cdktn.ITokenResolver">ITokenResolver</a>
  
  How to resolve tokens.
  
  #### Methods <a name="Methods" id="Methods"></a>
  
  | **Name** | **Description** |
  | --- | --- |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveList">ResolveList</a></code> | Resolve a tokenized list. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveMap">ResolveMap</a></code> | Resolve a tokenized map. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveNumberList">ResolveNumberList</a></code> | Resolve a tokenized number list. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveString">ResolveString</a></code> | Resolve a string with at least one stringified token in it. |
  | <code><a href="#cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveToken">ResolveToken</a></code> | Resolve a single token. |
  
  ---
  
  ##### `ResolveList` <a name="ResolveList" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveList"></a>
  
  ```go
  func ResolveList(l *[]*string, context IResolveContext) interface{}
  ```
  
  Resolve a tokenized list.
  
  ###### `l`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="l" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveList.parameter.l"></a>
  
  - *Type:* *[]*string
  
  ---
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveList.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `ResolveMap` <a name="ResolveMap" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveMap"></a>
  
  ```go
  func ResolveMap(m *map[string]interface{}, context IResolveContext) interface{}
  ```
  
  Resolve a tokenized map.
  
  ###### `m`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="m" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveMap.parameter.m"></a>
  
  - *Type:* *map[string]interface{}
  
  ---
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveMap.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `ResolveNumberList` <a name="ResolveNumberList" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveNumberList"></a>
  
  ```go
  func ResolveNumberList(l *[]*f64, context IResolveContext) interface{}
  ```
  
  Resolve a tokenized number list.
  
  ###### `l`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="l" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveNumberList.parameter.l"></a>
  
  - *Type:* *[]*f64
  
  ---
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveNumberList.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `ResolveString` <a name="ResolveString" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveString"></a>
  
  ```go
  func ResolveString(s TokenizedStringFragments, context IResolveContext) interface{}
  ```
  
  Resolve a string with at least one stringified token in it.
  
  (May use concatenation)
  
  ###### `s`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="s" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveString.parameter.s"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.TokenizedStringFragments">TokenizedStringFragments</a>
  
  ---
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveString.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---
  
  ##### `ResolveToken` <a name="ResolveToken" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveToken"></a>
  
  ```go
  func ResolveToken(t IResolvable, context IResolveContext, postProcessor IPostProcessor) interface{}
  ```
  
  Resolve a single token.
  
  ###### `t`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="t" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveToken.parameter.t"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolvable">IResolvable</a>
  
  ---
  
  ###### `context`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="context" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveToken.parameter.context"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IResolveContext">IResolveContext</a>
  
  ---
  
  ###### `postProcessor`<sup>Required</sup> <a name="postProcessor" id="cdktn.ITokenResolver.resolveToken.parameter.postProcessor"></a>
  
  - *Type:* <a href="#cdktn.IPostProcessor">IPostProcessor</a>
  
  ---
